title: P2PTrader
description: The purpose of this plugin is trading between players without scamming.
body:
**P2PTrader v1.0.0** is a **professional, scam-proof trading system** for **Minecraft 1.21+** servers, designed for **maximum security**, **high performance**, and **ease of use**. Built for **Paper/Spigot** with **Java 21+**, it enables **safe, transparent player-to-player trades** with **no setup required**.

Players enjoy **full item transparency** through **rich hover tooltips** showing *enchantments*, *durability*, *rarity*, and *lore*. Every trade is protected by **advanced security measures** including **session locking**, **distance checks**, and **inventory validation**, ensuring **fair exchanges every time**.

The system features a **clean, color-coded interface**, **Roman numeral enchantment levels**, and **organized formatting** for a **premium in-game experience**. Lightweight and **highly optimized**, P2PTrader runs **efficiently** with **minimal resource usage**.

**Key Benefits**  
- **For Players** – *No scams*, **intuitive commands**, quick and secure trades.  
- **For Server Owners** – **Reduced support tickets**, **professional server image**, and **improved player retention**.  
- **Out-of-the-box Ready** – Works instantly with **sensible defaults**, no complex configuration needed.  

Bring a **safe, modern, and polished trading system** to your server with **P2PTrader v1.0.0**.
